title: Notice Of Garret Street road closure To Bay View
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Garret Street will be...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Garret Street will be temporarily closed to Bay View Traffic between 20 January and 14 February 2025 to allow reconstruction and widening of the road.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Garret Street will be temporarily closed to Bay View Traffic between 20 January and 14 February 2025 to allow reconstruction and widening of the road."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Only road users to local businesses in Garret Street will be allowed access while the road is under halfwidth construction.","html":"Only road users to local businesses in Garret Street will be allowed access while the road is under halfwidth construction."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The Western Cape Government is working hard to maintain our roads. Please drive carefully during this period of construction. Let us work together to ensure that our roads are safe, for you!"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Layout plan: Garret Street half-width construction and access To Bay View closed between 20 Jan and 14 Feb 2025 layout plan: Garret Street half-width construction and access To Bay View closed between 20 Jan and 14 Feb.","html":"Layout plan: Garret Street half-width construction and access To Bay View closed between 20 Jan and 14 Feb 2025 layout plan: Garret Street half-width construction and access To Bay View closed between 20 Jan and 14 Feb."}]
